mapper.sql:
H.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND H.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO(+) AND HP.PERSON_ID = H.PERSON_ID AND H.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND EXISTS ( SELECT B1.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT B1 WHERE B1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO START WITH B1.DEPTNO IN ( SELECT HRD.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT HRD WHERE HRD.MANAGER_EMP_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR B1.DEPTNO = B1.PARENT_DEPT_NO UNION SELECT ASI.DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO ASI WHERE ASI.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO AND ASI.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND TRUNC(H.DATE_STARTED) <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || #{month, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMM')) AND (H.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TRUNC(H.DATE_LEFT) >= TO_DATE(#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || #{month, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'))
AND ( UPPER(H.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(H.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(H.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(H.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(H.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || H.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND H.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND H.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053' AND (SELECT HPI.NATIONALITY_CODE FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI WHERE HPI.PERSON_ID = H.PERSON_ID) <> '872'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_Q.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT H.EMPID AS EMPID, H.LOCAL_NAME AS LOCAL_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(H.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(HP.DOB, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DOB, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.DUTY_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DUTY_NAME, TO_CHAR(H.DATE_STARTED, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DATE_STARTED, TO_CHAR(H.END_PROBATION_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS END_PROBATION_DATE,
0 AS HC_DAY_OT, 0 AS HC_NIGHT_OT, 0 AS HC_NIGHT_OT_210, 0 AS REST_DAY_OT, 0 AS REST_NIGHT_OT, 0 AS HOL_DAY_OT, 0 AS HOL_NIGHT_OT, 0 AS ADMIN_SHIFT_DAYS, 0 AS NIGHT_SHIFT_DAYS, 0 AS STANDARD_WORK_DAYS FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE ORDER BY H.EMPID ASC ) INNER_Q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER} + #{length, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'MMYYYY'),'YYYYMM') AS AR_MONTH, HR.EMPID, HR.LOCAL_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) EMP_TYPE_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_FAMILY,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POST_FAMILY_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_GRADE_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POST_GRADE_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POSITION_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POSITION_NAME, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, TO_CHAR(HR.END_PROBATION_DATE,'DD/MM/YYYY') END_PROBATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_LEFT,

FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14015552','14016053') AND (SELECT HPI.NATIONALITY_CODE FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI WHERE HPI.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) <> '872' AND HR.EMPID LIKE 'MTS%' AND (HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD') > ) AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <> NVL(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'1099/01/01')
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053' AND (SELECT HPI2.NATIONALITY_CODE FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI2 WHERE HPI2.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) <> '872'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

SELECT #{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS YEAR, HR.EMPID, HR.PERSON_ID, HR.LOCAL_NAME, HR.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POSITION_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POSITION_NAME, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED,

AR_GET_ATTEND_VALUE(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('0101'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('0112'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), HR.PERSON_ID, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MATERNITY_LEAVE_DAYS_YEAR') MATERNITY_LEAVE_DAYS,
(SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(DETAIL.FROM_TIME),'DD/MM/YYYY') FROM AR_DETAIL_HFSV DETAIL WHERE DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('0101'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD') AND DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('0112'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND DETAIL.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID AND DETAIL.ITEM_NO IN ('141461')) FROM_TIME, (SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(DETAIL.TO_TIME),'DD/MM/YYYY') FROM AR_DETAIL_HFSV DETAIL WHERE DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('0101'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD') AND DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('0112'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND DETAIL.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID AND DETAIL.ITEM_NO IN ('141461')) TO_TIME
FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR, HR_PERSONAL_INFO H WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.PERSON_ID = H.PERSON_ID AND H.NATIONALITY_CODE = '873' AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('0112'||#{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14016053') AND HR.EMPID LIKE 'MTS%' AND HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14016053') AND HR.POST_FAMILY = '14015815' AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') >= '2025/12/01' AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') < '2026/03/01'
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14016053') AND HR.POST_FAMILY = '14015815' AND HR.EMPID LIKE 'MTS%' AND HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <> NVL(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'1099/01/01')
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14016053') AND HR.EMPID LIKE 'MTS%' AND HR.POST_FAMILY = '14015815' AND HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <> NVL(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'1099/01/01')
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC
mapper.sql:
${alias}.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ${alias}.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND ${alias}.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '10418' AND (${alias}.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(${alias}.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD') > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND TO_CHAR(${alias}.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(${alias}.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <> NVL(TO_CHAR(${alias}.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'1099/01/01')
AND ( UPPER(${alias}.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(${alias}.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(${alias}.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(${alias}.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(${alias}.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || ${alias}.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND ${alias}.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND ${alias}.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
mapper.select:
SELECT A.PERSON_ID, A.ORDER_NO,A.DEPTNO, A.CPNY_ID, A.EMPID, A.EMP_TYPE_CODE, A.DATE_LEFT, A.DATE_STARTED, A.ACTIVITY, A.EMP_OFFICE, A.EMPOYEE_ID, A.LOCAL_NAME, A.DEPT_NAME, A.START_DATE, A.PROBATION_END_DATE,
(NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0)) AS DAY_OT_WEEKDAY, (NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0)) AS NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY, (NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY_210,0)) AS NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210, (NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0)) AS DAY_OT_WEEKEND, (NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0)) AS NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND, (NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0)) AS DAY_OT_HOLIDAY, (NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0)) AS NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY, (NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY,0)) AS OT_TOTAL, (NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY_210,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKEND,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY,0)) AS OT_OVER_TOTAL, A.TYPE, A.LEFT_DATE, A.REMAIN_VAC, A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY, A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY_210, A.PROB_DAY_OT_SATURDAY, A.REG_DAY_OT_SATURDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_SATURDAY, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_SATURDAY, A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKEND, A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKEND, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_WEEKEND, A.PROB_DAY_OT_HOLIDAY, A.REG_DAY_OT_HOLIDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_HOLIDAY, A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY, A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY_210, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY_210, A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_SATURDAY, A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_SATURDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_SATURDAY, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_SATURDAY, A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKEND, A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKEND, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKEND, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_WEEKEND, A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY, A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY, A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY, A.REG_NIGHT_OT_OVER_HOLIDAY, A.OTHER_LEAVE_DAYS, A.DATE_1, A.DATE_2, A.DATE_3, A.DATE_4, A.DATE_5, A.DATE_6, A.DATE_7, A.DATE_8, A.DATE_9, A.DATE_10, A.DATE_11, A.DATE_12, A.DATE_13, A.DATE_14, A.DATE_15, A.DATE_16, A.DATE_17, A.DATE_18, A.DATE_19, A.DATE_20, A.DATE_21, A.DATE_22, A.DATE_23, A.DATE_24, A.DATE_25, A.DATE_26, A.DATE_27, A.DATE_28, A.DATE_29, A.DATE_30, A.DATE_31 FROM (SELECT HR.PERSON_ID, 1 AS ORDER_NO, HR.DEPTNO, HR.CPNY_ID, HR.EMPID, HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE, HR.DATE_LEFT, HR.DATE_STARTED, HR.ACTIVITY, HR.EMP_OFFICE, 'Công' as TYPE, HR.EMPID EMPOYEE_ID, HR.LOCAL_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPT_NAME, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'DD/MM/YYYY') START_DATE, FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14016053') AND HR.POST_FAMILY = '14015815' AND HR.EMPID LIKE 'MTS%' AND HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL AND HR.DATE_STARTED < TO_DATE('2026/03/01','YYYY/MM/DD')
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

SELECT HR.EMPID, HR.PERSON_ID, HR.LOCAL_NAME, HR.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPT_NAME, HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) EMP_TYPE_NAME, HR.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_FAMILY,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POST_FAMILY_NAME, HR.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_GRADE_NO,'en') POST_GRADE_NAME, HR.POSITION_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POSITION_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POSITION_NAME, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,1)-1,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED1, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,2)-1,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED2, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,3)-1,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED3, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,4)-1,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED4, TO_CHAR(HR.END_PROBATION_DATE,'DD/MM/YYYY') END_PROBATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_LEFT,
AR_GET_ATTEND_VALUE(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), HR.PERSON_ID,#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'TOTAL_NEW_EMP') TOTAL_NEW_EMP,
AR_GET_ATTEND_VALUE(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), HR.PERSON_ID,#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'TOTAL_LEAVE_COMPANY') TOTAL_LEAVE_COMPANY,
AR_GET_ATTEND_VALUE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,1),'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,2)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), HR.PERSON_ID,#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'TOTAL_NEW_EMP') TOTAL_NEW_EMP2,

AR_GET_ATTEND_VALUE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,2),'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,3)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), HR.PERSON_ID,#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'TOTAL_NEW_EMP') TOTAL_NEW_EMP3,
AR_GET_ATTEND_VALUE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,2),'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(HR.DATE_STARTED,3)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), HR.PERSON_ID,#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'TOTAL_LEAVE_COMPANY') TOTAL_LEAVE_COMPANY3,

DATE_IN_3006, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(HR.PERSON_ID, '2026/06/30', 'OUT_TIME') DATE_OUT_3006
FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14016053') AND HR.POST_FAMILY = '14015815' AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') >= '2026/03/01' AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

SELECT A.PERSON_ID, A.ORDER_NO,A.DEPTNO, A.CPNY_ID, A.EMPID, A.EMP_TYPE_CODE, A.DATE_LEFT, A.DATE_STARTED, A.ACTIVITY, A.EMP_OFFICE, A.EMPOYEE_ID, A.LOCAL_NAME, A.DEPT_NAME, A.START_DATE, A.PROBATION_END_DATE, (A.REG_WORK_DAYS/8 + A.REG_LEAVE_PAY_DAYS/8 + A.REG_REST_PAY_DAYS) AS OFFICAL_WORK_DAYS, (A.PROB_WORK_DAYS/8 + A.PROB_LEAVE_PAY_DAYS/8 + A.PROB_REST_PAY_DAYS) AS TRAIL_WORK_DAYS,
(NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_OVER_WEEKDAY,0)) AS DAY_OT_WEEKDAY, (NVL(A.PROB_NIGHT_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + SELECT A.PERSON_ID, A.ORDER_NO, A.DEPTNO, A.CPNY_ID, A.EMPID, A.EMP_TYPE_CODE, A.DATE_LEFT, A.DATE_STARTED, A.ACTIVITY, A.EMP_OFFICE, A.EMPOYEE_ID, A.LOCAL_NAME, A.DEPT_NAME, A.START_DATE, A.PROBATION_END_DATE, (A.REG_WORK_DAYS/8 + A.REG_LEAVE_PAY_DAYS/8 + A.REG_REST_PAY_DAYS) AS OFFICAL_WORK_DAYS, (A.PROB_WORK_DAYS/8 + A.PROB_LEAVE_PAY_DAYS/8 + A.PROB_REST_PAY_DAYS) AS TRAIL_WORK_DAYS, (A.LABOR_ACCIDENT_LEAVE_DAYS + A.RECOVER_LEAVE_DAYS + A.REASONS_UNPAID_LEAVE_DAYS + A.GOOUT_LEAVE_DAYS) AS UNPAID_LEAVE, (A.SICK_LEAVE_DAYS+A.CHILD_LEAVE_DAYS+A.PRENATAL_CHECK_LEAVE_DAYS+A.MATERNITY_LEAVE_DAYS+A.MATERNITY_MEN_LEAVE_DAYS +A.LABOR_ACCIDENT_LEAVE_DAYS+A.RECOVER_LEAVE_DAYS+A.REASONS_UNPAID_LEAVE_DAYS+A.GOOUT_LEAVE_DAYS + A.UNPAID_LEAVE_UNRAESON_DAYS) AS UNPAID_LEAVE_TOTAL, (A.MARRIAGE_LEAVE_DAYS + A.CHILD_MARRIAGE_LEAVE_DAYS + A.BEREAVEMENT_LEAVE_DAYS) AS FUNERAL_MARRIAGE_LEAVE, (A.STOP_WORK_LEAVE_DAYS+A.STOP_WORK50_LEAVE_DAYS+A.STOP_WORK70_LEAVE_DAYS+A.BREASTFEEDING_LEAVE_DAYS+A.BUSINESS_LEAVE_DAYS+A.WOMEN_LEAVE_HOURS) AS OTHER_PAID_LEAVE, (A.ANNUAL_LEAVE_DAYS+A.MARRIAGE_LEAVE_DAYS+A.CHILD_MARRIAGE_LEAVE_DAYS+A.BEREAVEMENT_LEAVE_DAYS+A.STOP_WORK_LEAVE_DAYS +A.STOP_WORK50_LEAVE_DAYS+A.STOP_WORK70_LEAVE_DAYS+A.BREASTFEEDING_LEAVE_DAYS+A.BUSINESS_LEAVE_DAYS+A.WOMEN_LEAVE_HOURS +A.COMPENSATORY_LEAVE_DAYS+A.COVID_LEAVE_DAYS+A.VACXIN_LEAVE_DAYS+A.HOME_LEAVE_DAYS+A.RECOVER_LEAVE_DAYS) AS TOTAL_PAID_LEAVE, (NVL(A.PROB_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0) + NVL(A.REG_DAY_OT_WEEKDAY,0)) AS FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14015552','14016053') AND (SELECT H.NATIONALITY_CODE FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO H WHERE H.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) = '873' AND (HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD') > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <> NVL(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'1099/01/01')
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'MMYYYY'),'YYYYMM') as AR_MONTH, HR.EMPID, HR.PERSON_ID, HR.LOCAL_NAME, HR.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPT_NAME, HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) EMP_TYPE_NAME, HR.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_FAMILY,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POST_FAMILY_NAME, HR.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_GRADE_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POST_GRADE_NAME, HR.POSITION_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POSITION_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) POSITION_NAME, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, TO_CHAR(HR.END_PROBATION_DATE,'DD/MM/YYYY') END_PROBATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_LEFT, AR_GET_VAC_FOR_ESS(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD'),#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},HR.PERSON_ID,'TOTAL_VAC') TOTAL_VAC, AR_GET_VAC_FOR_ESS(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD'),#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},HR.PERSON_ID,'USE_VAC') USE_VAC, AR_GET_VAC_FOR_ESS(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD'),#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},HR.PERSON_ID,'REMAIN_VAC') REMAIN_VAC, (SELECT TO_CHAR(HPI.DOB,'DD/MM/YYYY') FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI WHERE HPI.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) DOB, (SELECT PKG_DECRYPT.DECRYPT_DES(HPI.CELLPHONE) FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI WHERE HPI.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) PHONE, (SELECT HPI.HOME_ADDRESS FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI WHERE HPI.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) ADDRESS, (SELECT GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HPI.SEXCODE,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO HPI WHERE HPI.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) GENDER, GETTENPOINT(#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HR.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD'), '' , 'GROUP_TYPE') GROUP_TYPE,

FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('10418','14015552','14016053') AND HR.EMPID LIKE 'MTS%' AND (SELECT H.NATIONALITY_CODE FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO H WHERE H.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID) <> '872' AND (HR.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD') > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01'||#{arMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DDMMYYYY'),1)-1,'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_STARTED,'YYYY/MM/DD') <> NVL(TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'1099/01/01')
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{quickFilter, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HR.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE = '14016053'
AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '14016053'
ORDER BY HR.EMPID ASC
